kinds.description: Command-line projection using tables, structured output, exit-code discipline, and stdout/stderr conventions.
Terminal, cell, panel, or TUI-like projection fixture. This task permits deterministic descriptor fixtures only.
Software/GPU-rendered GUI projection descriptor. Runtime implementation is outside this task.
OS-widget projection descriptor. Runtime implementation is outside this task.
Automation, report, or JSON projection for CI, AIDE, and machine consumption.
